content.json:
# 📤 Data Exfiltration & Insider Risk
---
Detects data theft patterns across SharePoint/OneDrive, email forwarding, endpoint file activity, and cloud uploads. Correlates user activity across Office 365, MDE, and Entra to surface insider risk indicators.

content.query:
OfficeActivity
| summarize
    TotalEvents = count(),
    SharePointDownloads = countif(Operation == 'FileDownloaded' and OfficeWorkload == 'SharePoint'),
    OneDriveDownloads = countif(Operation == 'FileDownloaded' and OfficeWorkload == 'OneDrive'),
    ExternalShares = countif(Operation == 'SharingInvitationCreated'),
    AnonLinks = countif(Operation == 'AnonymousLinkCreated')
| project TotalEvents, SharePointDownloads, OneDriveDownloads, ExternalShares, AnonLinks
content.title: Office 365 activity summary

content.json: ## 📁 SharePoint & OneDrive — Mass Downloads & External Sharing

content.query:
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload in ('SharePoint', 'OneDrive')
| where Operation == 'FileDownloaded'
| summarize DownloadCount = count(), UniqueFiles = dcount(OfficeObjectId) by UserId
| where DownloadCount > 20
| sort by DownloadCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Users with high download volume (>20 files)

content.query:
OfficeActivity
| where Operation in ('SharingInvitationCreated', 'AnonymousLinkCreated', 'AddedToSecureLink')
| project TimeGenerated, UserId, Operation, OfficeObjectId, OfficeWorkload, ClientIP
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: External sharing & anonymous link creation

content.query:
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload in ('SharePoint', 'OneDrive')
| where Operation == 'FileDownloaded'
| summarize DownloadCount = count() by UserId, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where DownloadCount > 10
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Bulk download bursts — >10 files in a single hour

content.query:
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload == 'Exchange'
| where Operation in ('New-InboxRule', 'Set-InboxRule', 'New-TransportRule', 'Set-TransportRule')
| project TimeGenerated, UserId, Operation, Parameters, ClientIP
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Mail forwarding & transport rule changes

content.query:
EmailEvents
| where EmailDirection == 'Outbound'
| where isnotempty(SenderFromAddress)
| summarize OutboundCount = count(), UniqueRecipients = dcount(RecipientEmailAddress) by SenderFromAddress
| where OutboundCount > 50
| sort by OutboundCount desc
| take 20
content.title: High volume outbound senders

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where ActionType in ('FileCreated', 'FileCopied')
| where FolderPath has_any ('USB', 'Removable', 'D:\\', 'E:\\', 'F:\\', 'G:\\')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, ActionType, FileName, FolderPath, InitiatingProcessAccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Files copied to removable storage (USB)

content.query:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
| where RemoteIPType == 'Public'
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('dropbox.exe', 'googledrivesync.exe', 'onedrive.exe', 'box.exe', 'syncovery.exe', 'mega.exe', 'syncplicity.exe', 'sugarsync.exe')
| summarize UploadCount = count() by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, RemoteIP
| sort by UploadCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Cloud sync tool network activity — potential unapproved uploads

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where isnotempty(FileOriginUrl)
| where ActionType == 'FileCreated'
| where FolderPath has_any ('temp', 'tmp', 'appdata', 'downloads')
| where FileName has_any ('.zip', '.rar', '.7z', '.tar', '.gz')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, FileOriginUrl, InitiatingProcessAccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Archive files created in staging locations

content.query:
let MassDownloaders = OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload in ('SharePoint', 'OneDrive')
| where Operation == 'FileDownloaded'
| summarize DownloadCount = count() by UserId
| where DownloadCount > 20
| project UserId = tolower(UserId), DownloadCount;
let ExternalSharers = OfficeActivity
| where Operation in ('SharingInvitationCreated', 'AnonymousLinkCreated')
| summarize ShareCount = count() by UserId
| project UserId = tolower(UserId), ShareCount;
let MailRuleCreators = OfficeActivity
| where Operation in ('New-InboxRule', 'Set-InboxRule')
| summarize MailRules = count() by UserId
| project UserId = tolower(UserId), MailRules;
let RiskySignins = SigninLogs
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ('high', 'medium')
| summarize RiskySignins = count() by UserId = tolower(UserPrincipalName);
MassDownloaders
| join kind=leftouter ExternalSharers on UserId
| join kind=leftouter MailRuleCreators on UserId
| join kind=leftouter RiskySignins on UserId
| project UserId, DownloadCount, ShareCount = coalesce(ShareCount, 0), MailRules = coalesce(MailRules, 0), RiskySignins = coalesce(RiskySignins, 0)
| extend RiskScore = DownloadCount + (ShareCount * 5) + (MailRules * 10) + (RiskySignins * 3)
| sort by RiskScore desc
content.title: User risk score — mass downloads + external shares + mail rules + risky sign-ins

content.query:
let OffboardingUsers = AuditLogs
| where OperationName in ('Disable account', 'Delete user')
| extend TargetUPN = tostring(parse_json(tostring(TargetResources))[0].userPrincipalName)
| where isnotempty(TargetUPN)
| summarize DisabledAt = max(TimeGenerated) by TargetUPN;
OffboardingUsers
| join kind=inner (
    OfficeActivity
    | where OfficeWorkload in ('SharePoint', 'OneDrive')
    | where Operation == 'FileDownloaded'
    | summarize DownloadCount = count(), LastDownload = max(TimeGenerated) by UserId
    | project TargetUPN = tolower(UserId), DownloadCount, LastDownload
) on TargetUPN
| where LastDownload > DisabledAt - 7d
| project TargetUPN, DownloadCount, LastDownload, DisabledAt
| sort by DownloadCount desc
content.title: Downloads by offboarding users — activity within 7 days of account disable
